# Axly's Customs

> A small workshop building practical AI-powered tools, creative projects, web design services, and whatever's next.

## Services

- [Web Design](https://axly.com/webdesign/): Professional website design for small businesses — custom design, mobile-first, fast-loading. Base site $1,500 including domain setup, hosting, SEO, and contact forms. Houston area and remote.

## Products

- [Goldmine](https://pickaxe.axly.com): AI tool discovery engine — surfaces emerging AI tools and developer repos before they go mainstream, scored by real momentum data across 6 sources
- [Pickaxe](https://pickaxe.axly.com): The search interface for Goldmine's AI tool database
- [The Shovel](https://shovel.axly.com): Weekly newsletter highlighting the best AI tools discovered by Goldmine
- [ThothAI](https://axly.com/thothai/): Local AI document assistant — upload PDFs, build knowledge bases, ask questions. 100% offline, no cloud, no data leaves your machine. Available on Windows and iOS.
- [Axly Wallpapers](https://wallpapers.axly.com): Tiered AI-generated wallpaper service. A new wallpaper every day in 5 resolutions (desktop FHD/QHD/4K, ultrawide, mobile). Free tier shows the Wallpaper of the Week; email signup unlocks the last 10; $2.99/mo Pro unlocks the full archive and the daily drop.

## Blog

- [How Goldmine Scores AI Tools Before They Go Mainstream](https://axly.com/blog/how-goldmine-scores-ai-tools/): How the Goldmine Hype Index works — scoring AI tools across 6 platforms using real momentum data
- [Why ThothAI Processes Everything on Your Device](https://axly.com/blog/why-thothai-processes-everything-locally/): The design philosophy behind building a fully local, offline AI document assistant
- [What Is RAG and Why It Matters for Your Documents](https://axly.com/blog/what-is-rag-and-why-it-matters/): Retrieval-Augmented Generation explained simply — how AI can search your documents before answering
- [The 6 Platforms We Monitor to Find AI Tools Early](https://axly.com/blog/6-platforms-we-monitor-to-find-ai-tools/): What each platform tells us about whether an AI tool has real momentum

## Creative

- [Custom Digital Art](https://www.deviantart.com/axlyscustoms): Original art creations, commissions, and gallery
